title: An Act relative to damages for employees aggrieved by violations of the Massachusetts Wage Act

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Puppolo of Springfield, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Angelo J. Puppolo, Jr., relative to damages for employees aggrieved by violations of the Massachusetts Wage Act.  Labor and Workforce Development.
